title: VETERANS VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION AND EMPLOYMENT - 211info
text: STATEWIDE VETERAN SERVICES PORTLAND VETERANS VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION AND EMPLOYMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides vocational rehabilitation services for veterans with a service-connected disability. Conducts evaluation to establish eligibility and entitlement. Educational and vocational counseling assists in selection of an educational or vocational goal. Develops vocational rehabilitation plan and provides for payment of training fees and counseling. Also offers placement and follow-up services. 100 SW Main Street Floor 2 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm - (800) 692-9666 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 692-9666 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clark, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Services: Disability Related Center Based Employment * Veterans Vocational Rehabilitation * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - BENEFITS ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STATEWIDE VETERAN SERVICES PORTLAND
